creator: corecode@corecode.ath.cx
text:
sylpheed-claws is the cutting edge of sylpheed, a mail and news client.
-claws provides additional support for spell checking, filtering, scoring etc.

this PR supercedes PR ports/33047 that didn't get any regard :( (and
can be closed by now)

as it was pointed out to me i forgot including my real name in mail
and port. this is now (aparently) corected. sorry for that, i am new
to making ports. hope this time the port will make it through!
